model.description: Primary analysis model in provider/model format (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5)

fallbackModel.description: Fallback model used when the primary model is rate-limited (429). API key must be set in CODE_OWL_LLM_MODEL_API_KEY_FALLBACK.

apiKeyEnvVariable.description: Name of the environment variable containing the API key

exclude.description: Additional paths/patterns to exclude from analysis
